meta_desc_index: Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort, nestled between mountains and rivers, offering weak acid carbonated hydrogen sodium hot spring. Features public bath, private rooms, and premium facilities.
meta_title_facilities: Facilities | Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort
meta_desc_facilities: Introduction to Wulai Spa facilities, including elegant cafe and outdoor lounge seats. Enjoy mountain leisure.
meta_title_public: Public Bath | Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort
meta_desc_public: Wulai Spa public bath with hot, warm, low temp, and cold pools. Features back water massage jets, bubble beds, and sauna.
meta_title_private: Private Rooms | Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort
meta_desc_private: Wulai Spa features 35 private rooms, including outdoor open-air and indoor family double pools built with natural stones and logs.
meta_title_news: News & Events | Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort
meta_desc_news: Latest announcements and news from Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort.
cta_line: Spend an afternoon soaking in the mountain hot spring
footer_addr_1: No. 36, Laka Rd., Wulai Dist., New Taipei City (Free Parking)
footer_copy: © Wulai Spa Hot Spring Resort Wulaispa
hero_line1:
Mountain breezes drift into the forest,
The murmur of the stream fills the room.
hero_line2:
A pool of warm spring water,
And all worries fade into silence.
intro_eyebrow: Wulai Hot Spring · Wulai Spa Resort
intro_text:
Ascending along Nanshi Creek, mountains layer and mist lingers year-round.
The hot spring water here is colorless and odorless. The weak acid carbonated hydrogen sodium spring stays warm,
a hot spring land passed down through generations by the Atayal tribe, and a corner outside the city
for you to cast off all worries.
split1_desc: Built along the mountain and river, the separate male and female public baths feature four pools of high, medium, low temperature and cold spring. Equipped with back-washing water jets, bubble massage beds, and sauna, it is the simplest way to unwind.
split2_desc: The outdoor open-air private rooms are built with natural stones, allowing you to enjoy the mountain scenery while bathing. The indoor family private rooms are equipped with hot and cold double pools, perfect for private family moments.
services_title:
Find your own rhythm
between the mountains and forests.
facilities_intro:
Beyond hot spring baths, the resort prepares suitable corners for every moment—
whether it is a chat after dining, or simply sitting down,
listening quietly to the sound of Nanshi Creek.
fac1_desc: Equipped with large whiteboard, projection equipment, and spacious conference tables and chairs, suitable for annual plans, business meetings, etc. You can also visit nearby scenic spots and Wulai Old Street.
fac2_desc: Located on the first floor, it offers a peaceful rest area after bathing, serving various hot and cold drinks and snacks. Feel free to ask service staff for options.
fac3_desc: Located on the pedestrian path outside the resort, next to the mountains and river. You can rest while enjoying the view, watching white egrets fly over the stream, and listening to the stream flow.
public_intro:
Built along the mountain and river, the male and female public baths preserve natural beauty.
The bath is divided into four pools: high, medium, low temp, and cold spring to promote circulation.
The ladies' bath features outdoor pools and lounge chairs to enjoy a lazy sunbath under the trees.
pub1_desc: Both male and female baths are equipped with back-washing water jets and bubble massage beds to enjoy hydrotherapy. There are also Finnish saunas and steam rooms for different spa experiences.
pub2_desc: Back water jets and bubble beds stimulate muscles with water pressure and bubbles, relieving tension, which is the most enjoyable extension after a hot spring bath.
pub3_desc: Professional massage services including full-body acupressure, aromatic oil massage, body exfoliation, cupping, facial care, etc., to relax your body and mind completely.
pub4_desc: Finnish wood sauna. Sweating in high temperature and then entering the cold pool, alternating hot and cold, is one of the most popular experiences in the public bath area.
public_time_li1: Opening hours are adjusted flexibly according to the season. Please call the resort for details.
public_time_li2: Cleaned and disinfected daily, so 24-hour service is not available. Thank you for your understanding.
public_price_val: Per person NT$600　Special offer NT$500
public_price_li1: Charged per entry. Separate naked baths for men and women (no swimwear allowed). Single entry only.
public_price_li2: For safety, guests must be aged 13 or above accompanied by adults. Same rate applies.
public_price_li3: Provides one large towel and shower cap. Shower gel, shampoo, comb, hair dryer, etc., are available.
public_price_li4: Food and pets are prohibited inside.
public_price_li5: Includes a complimentary drink coupon to be redeemed at the Cafe after bathing.
private_intro:
For private moments, the resort features 35 private rooms,
divided into outdoor open-air and indoor family types.
Each is built with natural stones or wood, creating a private haven.
priv1_desc: Spacious bath pools built with natural stones. The semi-open design lets you enjoy the natural rock views. Secure privacy combined with stream sounds and birds singing.
priv2_desc: Equipped with hot and cold double pools built with natural wood. You can experience hot and cold bathing to promote circulation in a private indoor environment.
private_time_li1: Opening hours are adjusted flexibly according to the season. Please call the resort for details.
private_time_li2: Food and pets are prohibited inside.
private_price_val: Per person NT$600　Special offer NT$500
private_price_li1: Charged per person. Minimum 2 adults per room. Usage limit: 1 hour.
private_price_li2: Children under 110cm: Free. 110-130cm: Special rate of NT$250 per child (requires 2 adults accompanying).
private_price_li3: Children above 130cm are charged adult rate.
private_price_li4: Includes a complimentary drink coupon to be redeemed at the Cafe after bathing.
